title: Duplicating an item across multiple groups
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have several groups in 1 board and would like to update a theme across all groups, so I don’t have to manually add them. 
Can you please explain what function I can use to do this?

posts.author: AlanaP (Alana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have several groups in 1 board and would like to update a theme across all groups, so I don’t have to manually add them.

Can you please explain what function I can use to do this?

posts.author: ahoffmeyer (A Hoffmeyer)
posts.cookedHtml: I successfully used the ‘Sidekick’ feature. I selected the item to be copied, clicked on the Sidekick icon and typed “copy this item to all groups on this board”. Took about 30 seconds to copy the item across 12 groups. The newly copied item does not say ‘copy’.
